message:
So there I was, sitting on the couch with my trusty pup, Max, when the thunderstorm rolled in. You know the kind that makes even the bravest dog want to hide under the blanket? 🌩️ I thought, "Uh-oh, time for the family group chat!" 

I quickly texted everyone: "Is your dog okay? Max is in full drama mode!" Within minutes, my phone was buzzing with responses. My sister sent a photo of her dog peeking out from behind the couch, and my brother shared a video of his barking at the raindrops like they were intruders. 😂 

It was such a relief to know we were all in the same boat, sharing tips on calming our furry friends and just checking in on each other. It reminded me how important it is to have a little plan in place for our pets during storms or emergencies. 

This little refresher helped me feel more prepared for the next time Mother Nature decides to throw a tantrum. How do you and your pets handle stormy weather?
